articles.author: Meredith Lee Hill
articles.title: The GOP’s dirty little secret about the SAVE America Act - Politico
articles.description: The president is demanding the inclusion of mail-voting restrictions that are highly unpopular among some Republicans.
articles.content: Listen, absentee ballots are not a bad thing historically as long as you put some kind of structure on it, Rep. Mark Amodei (R-Nevada) said in an interview. Just have some commonsensical safeguards f… [+1667 chars]
